mapper.sql: call_id, caller_user_id, caller_nick_name, callee_user_id, callee_nick_name, call_type, status, start_time, answer_time, end_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into call_info( call_id, caller_user_id, caller_nick_name, callee_user_id, callee_nick_name, call_type, status, start_time, answer_time, end_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{bean.callId}, #{bean.callerUserId}, #{bean.callerNickName}, #{bean.calleeUserId}, #{bean.calleeNickName}, #{bean.callType}, #{bean.status}, #{bean.startTime}, #{bean.answerTime}, #{bean.endTime}, #{bean.createTime}, #{bean.updateTime} ) on duplicate key update caller_user_id = values(caller_user_id), caller_nick_name = values(caller_nick_name), callee_user_id = values(callee_user_id), callee_nick_name = values(callee_nick_name), call_type = values(call_type), status = values(status), start_time = values(start_time), answer_time = values(answer_time), end_time = values(end_time), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)

insert into call_info( call_id, caller_user_id, caller_nick_name, callee_user_id, callee_nick_name, call_type, status, start_time, answer_time, end_time, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.callId}, #{item.callerUserId}, #{item.callerNickName}, #{item.calleeUserId}, #{item.calleeNickName}, #{item.callType}, #{item.status}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.answerTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update caller_user_id = values(caller_user_id), caller_nick_name = values(caller_nick_name), callee_user_id = values(callee_user_id), callee_nick_name = values(callee_nick_name), call_type = values(call_type), status = values(status), start_time = values(start_time), answer_time = values(answer_time), end_time = values(end_time), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update call_info
caller_user_id = #{bean.callerUserId}, caller_nick_name = #{bean.callerNickName}, callee_user_id = #{bean.calleeUserId}, callee_nick_name = #{bean.calleeNickName}, call_type = #{bean.callType}, status = #{bean.status}, start_time = #{bean.startTime}, answer_time = #{bean.answerTime}, end_time = #{bean.endTime}, create_time = #{bean.createTime}, update_time = #{bean.updateTime},
